market_summary.KOSPI: Surged 4.30% to 5,638.20 at opening, rebounding on de-escalation of Middle East tensions.
market_summary.context: Strong rebound fueled by positive overnight sentiment and geopolitical cooling; market heavyweights leading the charge.

art_highlights.detail: Preview days commence tomorrow, March 25, followed by public viewing March 27-29. Notable for new digital art initiatives and a landmark collaboration deal with HK.
Event ramp-up continuing today, featuring expanded 'Encounters' sector and upcoming five-year collaboration deal with Art Basel.
